profile.name: Luke Harjulin
profile.intro: I build cloud automation, delivery tooling, and platform foundations that help engineering teams move faster with cleaner engineering practices.
profile.headline: Platform engineer for automated cloud delivery.
summary: Senior DevOps Engineer with 5+ years building platform tooling, cloud automation, and delivery workflows across aviation and travel, utilities trading, and industrial cloud environments.
My work centres on automation-led delivery: pipeline templates, infrastructure modules, application scaffolding, cloud migration support, environment lifecycle workflows, and developer enablement.
I also design AI-assisted engineering workflows and agentic tooling that connect assistants to project practices, team standards, and delivery platforms such as AWS, Jira, and Octopus Deploy.
cvSummary: Senior DevOps Engineer with 5+ years' experience building platform tooling, cloud automation, and delivery workflows across aviation and travel, utilities trading, and industrial cloud environments. Progressed from Junior Engineer to Senior DevOps Engineer at NTT DATA while working across AWS, Azure, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, ServiceNow automation, and identity platform configuration.

Strongest where delivery needs automation-led foundations: pipeline templates, infrastructure modules, application scaffolding, cloud migration support, environment lifecycle workflows, and developer enablement. Also designs AI-assisted engineering workflows, agentic tooling, and assistant guardrails that help teams apply project-specific practices across delivery platforms such as AWS, Jira, and Octopus Deploy.
focus: Automation-led platform tooling for engineering teams.
Cloud migration, IaC, and CI/CD delivery.
AI-assisted engineering workflows and agentic tooling.

platformFocus.title: Delivery Approach
platformFocus.description: Build delivery automation and AI-assisted engineering workflows that help teams ship cloud applications and infrastructure with less friction, stronger consistency, and clearer governance.

metrics.label: Aviation, travel, utilities trading, and industrial platforms
Cloud infrastructure, application hosting, and IaC
Agentic workflows, CI/CD tooling, scripting, and platform integration

impactHighlights.title: Cloud Migration Enablement
impactHighlights.description: Supported aviation and travel engineering teams with AWS migration, GitHub adoption, delivery automation, and platform practices.
points: Helped move core applications from on-prem hosting toward AWS environments.
Supported GitHub adoption, delivery automation, and emerging AI-assisted engineering practices.

impactHighlights.title: Reusable CI/CD Platform
impactHighlights.description: Built central GitHub workflows and actions for Terraform, npm, .NET, SFTP, and AWS role management, reducing duplicated pipeline logic across teams.
points: Built central GitHub workflows and actions for Terraform, npm, .NET, SFTP, and AWS role management.
Reduced duplicated pipeline logic and supported TeamCity to GitHub Actions migration.

impactHighlights.title: Azure Platform Engineering
impactHighlights.description: Delivered infrastructure for React, .NET API, and JMeter performance testing apps, integrating Azure Batch, Service Bus, Event Grid, CDN, Media Services, and private networking.
points: Delivered infrastructure for React, .NET API, and JMeter performance testing apps.
Integrated Azure Batch, Service Bus, Event Grid, CDN, Media Services, and private networking.

impactHighlights.title: Delivery Starter Kits
impactHighlights.description: Created tooling to generate .NET APIs, Azure DevOps pipelines, Kubernetes manifests, and repository content, with frontend templates wired to API services.
points: Created tooling to generate .NET API, Azure DevOps pipelines, and Kubernetes manifests.
Extended templates so React or Angular frontends could connect to APIs out-of-the-box.

impactHighlights.title: Infrastructure as Code
impactHighlights.description: Built Terraform modules and layered cloud patterns across AWS and Azure, improving repeatability for infrastructure changes and environment-aware delivery.
points: Built Terraform modules and layered infrastructure patterns across AWS and Azure.
Improved repeatability for infrastructure changes and environment-aware delivery.

impactHighlights.title: Governed Delivery Automation
impactHighlights.description: Automated ServiceNow change creation and closure from CI/CD, and supported GitOps identity workflows with promotion, rollback, and dry-run paths.
points: Automated ServiceNow change creation and closure from CI/CD pipelines.
Supported GitOps identity workflows with review, rollback, and dry-run.

experience.cvContext: Cross-sector platform, DevOps, and cloud infrastructure delivery
experience.summary: Progressed from Junior Engineer to Senior DevOps Engineer while delivering cloud, platform, automation, and release engineering work for client delivery teams.
responsibilities: Translate client delivery needs into automated platform patterns, pipelines, scripts, and infrastructure modules.
Work across application, cloud, and release boundaries, combining hands-on implementation with guidance for engineering teams.
Support adoption of shared delivery platforms through documentation, pairing, migration support, and practical troubleshooting.
Improve delivery reliability and traceability through repeatable build, deploy, environment, and change-management workflows.
Operate across AWS, Azure, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, scripting, and application scaffolding depending on the engagement.

sectorHighlights.title: Aviation & Travel
sectorHighlights.summary: Supported aviation and travel engineering teams through on-prem to AWS migration, GitHub adoption, delivery automation, and platform enablement.
points: Established central workflows and actions for Terraform, npm, .NET, SFTP, and AWS role management.
Supported TeamCity to GitHub Actions migration, GitHub Advanced Security trials, and team onboarding.
Helped delivery teams adopt automated release paths, reusable platform patterns, and AI-assisted engineering practices.

sectorHighlights.title: Utilities Trading
sectorHighlights.summary: Built a starter platform for .NET APIs, Azure DevOps pipelines, Kubernetes manifests, and AKS deployment.
points: Created object-oriented PowerShell generator for API, pipeline, and manifest scaffolding.
Extended the template to support React or Angular frontends communicating with the API.

sectorHighlights.title: Industry

points: Integrated Azure Batch, Service Bus, Event Grid, Media Services, CDN, and private networking.
